pageContext.name: Harry Potter Great Hall Mural
pageContext.description: Sideshow and RoomMates are excited to present the Harry Potter Great Hall Mural!  Turn any room in your home into the Great Hall of Hogwarts with the RoomMates Decor Great Hall Peel and Stick Wall Mural. Assembled it is 6 feet tall and 1.5 feet wide, and comes with 7 panels 18' wide and 72' long. This iconic setting from the Harry Potter movies is easily recognizable to fans at any level.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
